title: Litch-knife
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Litch-blade''' was a type of [[Knife/Legends|knife]] that had a curved blade. The [[Drovian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Kurjj]] tried to use one of these weapons to kill [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], however he was ultimately defeated by the young [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Hunted]]''

[[Category:Knives]]
